title: Specify plan.yaml
description: Validates the structure of `plan.yaml` (at the repo root): the initiative name, the optional named-sources map, and the ordered list of plan changes with their dependencies and status. Strict schema — unknown fields are rejected. Written by `specify plan {init,create,amend,transition,archive}`; read by `/spec:execute` and by humans driving the Layer 1 loop. Scope and delta-targeting intent are carried in the `description` field and inferred by the define skill at execution time.

name.description: Initiative name. Kebab-case; becomes the archive filename prefix.

sources.description: Named source repositories. Keys are kebab-case identifiers referenced by each change's `sources` list; values are paths or URLs. Parsed and validated in Layer 1; resolved to define-step arguments in Layer 2.

changes.description: Ordered list of plan changes. Order is the tie-breaker for `specify plan next` when multiple entries are eligible.

kebabName.description: Kebab-case identifier: lowercase letters and digits grouped by single internal hyphens; no leading, trailing, or consecutive hyphens. Matches `specify_slice::actions::validate_name`.

name.description: Change name. Unique across the plan; becomes the Specify change directory name when the entry transitions to `in-progress`.

project.description: Target registry project name (RFC-3b). Required for multi-project registries; optional for single-project.

schema.description: Schema identifier for project-less entries (e.g. `contracts@v1`). Required when `project` is absent; optional override when `project` is present.

status.description: Current state in the plan status state machine.

depends-on.description: Change names that must be `done` before this change is eligible. Consumed by `specify plan next`.

sources.description: Keys into the plan's top-level `sources` map indicating which source repositories to analyze. Absent or `[]` → greenfield.

context.description: Baseline paths relevant to this change, relative to `.specify/`. Briefs use these as a focus hint when scanning baseline directories. Populated by `/spec:plan` or manually via `specify plan add --context`.

description.description: Free-text scoping context for the define step. Carries file-path hints for scope inference and references to prior change names for delta-target inference. The define skill reads this field to determine extract filters and baseline targets.

status-reason.description: Why the change is `failed`/`blocked`/`skipped`. Overwritten on each status transition; cleared when re-entering `pending`/`in-progress`/`done`.
